data.title: TECNO Debuts SPARK 50 Series with Two Powerful Models: Next-Level AI Goes Mainstream Alongside a 5G Pioneer and a 7000mAh Endurance King
data.description: TECNO, a global tech brand, has introduced the SPARK 50 and SPARK 50 5G models which cater to the young, tech-savvy generation with their emphasis on durability. These phones come equipped with large batteries, military-grade toughness, and advanced AI features. The launch took place in Hong Kong on April 2, 2026.

Katayama notes that Japan has signaled its willingness to respond firmly to FX market fluctuations.
Speculative trading in oil and forex markets has been vigorous, says Japan’s Finance Minister Katayama.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Enters Correction As Oil Jumps; Micron Rises (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline due to President Trump's decision to extend the deadline for Iran negotiations. This led to a rally in oil prices. The stock market today saw the Dow entering into correction territory while oil prices surged. Micron also saw an increase in its stock value.
Japan’s Finance Minister Katayama says decisions on specific monetary policy measures are up to the BOJ.
10-year Japanese government bond yields hit 2.395%, the strongest reading since Feb 1999.

data.title: LG Energy Solution Becomes First Battery Company to Join SDVerse, Global B2B Marketplace for Automotive Software
data.description: LG Energy Solution's move to join SDVerse, the inaugural B2B marketplace for automotive software, marks a significant shift for the company as it ventures beyond battery production to focus on software and services. The company is set to provide five primary battery software solutions tailored for the autonomous driving vehicle sector. This strategic shift highlights LG Energy Solution's commitment to innovation and growth in the automotive industry.

One person sustained injuries after shrapnel from an Iranian rocket landed in Ramat Gan, according to Israeli reports.
The aircraft carrier Lincoln continues supporting U.S. operations in Iran.
The Nikkei in Japan gains 1.8%, reaching 53,424.72.

data.title: Liam Mona Expands Mona Power Nationwide, Driving Growth in Solar and EV Infrastructure
data.description: On April 2, 2026, in Detroit, Liam Mona assumed the role of President and Managing Partner at Mona Power, an expanding solar energy firm. This company focuses on providing residential and commercial solar systems, as well as electric vehicle charging options throughout the United States. Mona Power has experienced significant growth and differentiation by offering high-quality solutions in the renewable energy sector.

data.title: LG Chairman Kwang Mo Koo Visits U.S. ESS Hub 'Vertech,' Emphasizing Leadership in AI-Era Energy Infrastructure
data.description: In April 2, 2026, Kwang Mo Koo, the Chairman and CEO of LG Corp, traveled to the United States to assess the company's upcoming growth strategies. He specifically concentrated on energy infrastructure as a crucial element in the AI era. This move demonstrates Chairman Koo's dedication to steering the company towards success in this rapidly evolving technological landscape.
